--- title: "ex12. Causal (Same backend, SB Backend) - Laplace Kernel" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel {#causal-sb-same-backend} This vignette fits two SB-based causal models using the same kernel (Laplace): - Model A: bulk-only outcome models (GPD = FALSE) - Model B: GPD-augmented outcome models (GPD = TRUE) --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("causal_alt_real500_p4_k2", package = "CausalMixGPD") y <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$y T <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$T X <- as.matrix(causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$X) summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) summary_tbl %>% mutate(value = signif(value, 4)) %>% kable(caption = "Causal Dataset Summary", align = "c") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE, position = "center") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Causal Dataset Summary
statistic value
N 500.000
Mean 0.274
SD 1.764
Min -8.089
Max 5.275
````` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} x_eval <- X[1:40, , drop = FALSE] y_eval <- y[1:40] u_threshold <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(y, 0.8, names = FALSE)) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_causal <- data.frame(y = y, T = as.factor(T), x1 = X[, 1], x2 = X[, 2]) p_scatter <- ggplot(df_causal, aes(x = x1, y = y, color = T)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + labs(title = "Outcome vs X1 by Treatment", x = "X1", y = "y", color = "Treatment") + theme_minimal() p_scatter ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/data-scatter-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Model A: SB Bulk-only (Laplace) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_sb_bulk <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = "laplace", backend = "sb", PS = "logit", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1) ) bundle_sb_bulk ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X) Field Treated Control Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process Kernel laplace laplace Components 5 5 GPD tail FALSE FALSE Epsilon 0.025 0.025 Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle summary CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X) Field Treated Control Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process Kernel laplace laplace Components 5 5 GPD tail FALSE FALSE Epsilon 0.025 0.025 Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_bulk <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` |-------------|-------------|-------------|-------------| |-------------------------------------------------------| ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, scale, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (30) - alpha - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - v[] (4 elements) conjugate sampler (5) - scale[] (5 elements) categorical sampler (232) - z[] (232 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, scale, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (30) - alpha - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - v[] (4 elements) conjugate sampler (5) - scale[] (5 elements) categorical sampler (268) - z[] (268 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` -- PS fit -- CausalMixGPD PS fit model: logit -- Outcome fits -- [control] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE n = 232 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. [treated] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE n = 268 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} params(fit_sb_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters (causal) [treated] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "2.302" $w [1] "0.425" "0.277" "0.167" $beta_location x1 x2 x3 x4 comp1 "0.784" "-0.463" "-0.367" "0.423" comp2 "-0.095" "-0.912" "-0.267" "0.413" comp3 "0.123" "0.957" "0.151" "0.093" comp4 "0.259" "-0.217" "0.189" "-0.185" comp5 "0.196" "-0.008" "0.386" "0.824" $beta_ps_location [1] "-0.909" "0.361" "-0.23" "0.111" "0.01" $scale [1] "0.863" "1.057" "1.493" [control] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.957" $w [1] "0.505" "0.334" $beta_location x1 x2 x3 x4 comp1 "-0.196" "-0.038" "-0.248" "1.827" comp2 "0.472" "0.183" "-0.426" "-0.217" comp3 "0.221" "0.405" "-0.276" "0.527" comp4 "0.14" "-0.051" "0.024" "0.538" comp5 "-0.551" "0.197" "-0.166" "-0.241" $beta_ps_location [1] "-0.21" "-1.001" "-0.617" "0.064" "0.25" $scale [1] "0.977" "1.164" ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_bulk, family = c("traceplot", "autocorrelation", "running")) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_mean_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) safe_plot(pred_mean_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-mean-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-mean-sb-bulk-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_q_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, type = "quantile", p = 0.5, interval = "credible") safe_plot(pred_q_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-quantile-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-quantile-sb-bulk-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_d_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "density", interval = "credible") safe_plot(pred_d_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-density-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_surv_bulk <- predict(fit_sb_bulk, x = x_eval, y = y_eval, type = "survival", interval = "credible") safe_plot(pred_surv_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/predict-survival-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ate_bulk <- ate(fit_sb_bulk, newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) safe_plot(ate_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/ate-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/ate-sb-bulk-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} qte_bulk <- qte(fit_sb_bulk, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), newdata = x_eval, interval = "credible") safe_plot(qte_bulk) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/qte-sb-bulk-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb_files/figure-html/qte-sb-bulk-2.png){width=768} ::: ::: --- ## Model B: SB with GPD Tail (Laplace) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} param_specs_gpd <- list( gpd = list( threshold = list( mode = "dist", dist = "lognormal", args = list(meanlog = log(max(u_threshold, .Machine$double.eps)), sdlog = 0.25) ) ) ) bundle_sb_gpd <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = "laplace", backend = "sb", PS = "logit", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = param_specs_gpd, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2) ) bundle_sb_gpd ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X) Field Treated Control Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process Kernel laplace laplace Components 5 5 GPD tail TRUE TRUE Epsilon 0.025 0.025 Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle summary CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X) Field Treated Control Backend Stick-Breaking Process Stick-Breaking Process Kernel laplace laplace Components 5 5 GPD tail TRUE TRUE Epsilon 0.025 0.025 Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_gpd <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` |-------------|-------------|-------------|-------------| |-------------------------------------------------------| ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, beta_tail_scale, scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (41) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - threshold - beta_tail_scale[] (4 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (232) - z[] (232 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_location, beta_ps_location, beta_tail_scale, scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (41) - alpha - scale[] (5 elements) - beta_location[] (20 elements) - beta_ps_location[] (5 elements) - threshold - beta_tail_scale[] (4 elements) - tail_shape - v[] (4 elements) categorical sampler (268) - z[] (268 elements) ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` -- PS fit -- CausalMixGPD PS fit model: logit -- Outcome fits -- [control] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE n = 232 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. [treated] MixGPD fit | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Laplace Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE n = 268 | components = 5 | epsilon = 0.025 MCMC: niter=2500, nburnin=500, thin=1, nchains=1 Fit Use summary() for posterior summaries; plot() for diagnostics; predict() for predictions. ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} params(fit_sb_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters (causal) [treated] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.883" $w [1] "0.47" "0.315" "0.168" $beta_location x1 x2 x3 x4 comp1 "0.116" "-0.609" "-0.097" "0.771" comp2 "-0.554" "0.415" "0.039" "0.339" comp3 "-0.014" "0.097" "0.557" "1.684" comp4 "-0.143" "0.175" "0.016" "0.438" comp5 "0.386" "-0.152" "-0.159" "0.524" $beta_ps_location [1] "0.428" "0.583" "1.023" "0.13" "-0.305" $scale [1] "1.325" "1.338" "1.493" $beta_tail_scale [1] "0.033" "-0.141" "0.161" "-0.048" $tail_shape [1] "0.026" [control] Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "1.12" $w [1] "0.56" "0.308" $beta_location x1 x2 x3 x4 comp1 "1.182" "0.759" "-0.647" "0.202" comp2 "-0.824" "0.043" "-0.127" "1.994" comp3 "-0.045" "-0.438" "-0.099" "0.643" comp4 "-0.137" "-0.145" "0.413" "-0.102" comp5 "-0.037" ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_sb_gpd, family = c("density", "geweke", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pred_mean_gpd <- predict(fit_sb_gpd, x = x_eval, type = "mean", interval = "credible", nsim_mean = 100) safe_plot(pred_mean_gpd) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
